summary: App ComfyUI bump 0.19.3 → 0.25.0 (5ef0092 / frontend 1.45.15). Depends on MPI-117 lock. RunPod branch only.

Retargeted to NAMED release v0.25.1 (SHA eca4757, frontend 1.45.15 auto-pinned via requirements.txt). Source of truth = release, not local machine (local rig mid-fix, being reinstalled fresh from v0.25.1).
Added CUDA-build guard: do NOT bump images to cu130 (data-center driver lag); lock ComfyUI v0.25.1 core+frontend+nodes only, CUDA stays per-environment.

CORRECTED stale cu130 claim: USER reports live Pods show CUDA 13.0 (driver ≥580) so cu130 would boot; reason to keep cu128 is COVERAGE (≥570 vs cu130 ≥580), not driver-age. Added TODO: live nvidia-smi confirmation (user-only op).

Added IMAGE REBUILD REQUIRED section: MPI-117 rebuild deferred + batched here; after MPI-118 edits, bump node_lock.json to v0.25.1 targets + run /build-pod-image as v0.5.0; MPI-117 closes with this combined rebuild.

Pre-impl review: fixed 0.25.0/0.25.1 version drift; added node_lock.json core+frontend to app-side scope (TWO version sources — system_deps + lock — verified both must move); decided KEEP nodes as-is for v0.25.1; restated MPI-117 as interleaving (lock exists, won't close before 118); dedup'd rebuild step1 vs scope. Open items: portable-asset+templates version confirm (network), live nvidia-smi (user op).

USER DECISION: cu128 locked for safety (wider coverage, no functional loss vs cu130). nvidia-smi TODO dropped — no live check needed, final. Remaining open item: portable-asset download test (URL 200, core SHA eca4757, requirements.txt frontend 1.45.15 + templates real value) — user running now.

Portable VERIFIED by extracting real v0.25.1 7z (1.92GB exact size): core SHA eca4757 (git rev-parse, real .git not detached), git describe=v0.25.1, comfyui_version.py=0.25.1 (NOT 0.25.0 — old lag note was wrong, corrected), frontend==1.45.15, workflow-templates==0.10.0 (was the one lock unknown, now resolved). All anchors confirmed. ZERO open items — card spec-complete, ready to implement.

USER's G:\ComfyUi install verified = exact bump target (eca4757/v0.25.1/frontend 1.45.15/templates 0.10.0). Upgrade-prompt path verified ALREADY CODED: version-check needsUpgrade -> shell.js show('upgrading') -> /engine/upgrade (models-safe, remove old, install new). No UI to build. Added dev acceptance test (open app -> prompt -> accept -> reinstall 0.25.1 -> gen) + 1.1.0 user-facing framing. G: has extra dev nodes (Manager/rgthree/LTXVideo/BFS) not in lock — IGNORED per user + keep-nodes-as-is decision.

todo -> doing. Implementing the bump: system_dependencies.json engine.version 0.19.3->0.25.1 + node_lock.json core v0.25.1/eca4757 + frontend 1.45.15 + templates 0.10.0. Both edits done + verified on disk; no stale refs elsewhere.

APP-SIDE BUMP DONE + VALIDATED LIVE on Windows. Engine v0.25.1 (system_deps + node_lock core eca4757/frontend 1.45.15/templates 0.10.0). Gens pass: t2i, t2v, frame-interp, UW mask+detail. Real upgrade-flow tested: 5 bugs found+fixed+verified — SSE progress bar, RES4LYF cp1252 crash (removed node + PYTHONUTF8=1), upgrade models-path preserve (getCustomRoot), model-node-deps reinstall (PainterI2Vadvanced), path-change ComfyUI restart. RES4LYF removed (unused premature add). Stays in DOING: image rebuild (v0.5.0, batched w/ MPI-117) still pending — card closes WITH that rebuild. Spawned MPI-120 (offline) + MPI-121 (object_info refresh).
